name: atem-overseer
description: Multi-device monitoring & control dashboard for Blackmagic ATEM switchers

scripts.dev: npm run build:libs && npm run dev --workspace @atem-overseer/server
scripts.dev:mock: npm run build:libs && npm run dev:mock --workspace @atem-overseer/server
scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build --workspace @atem-overseer/web && npm run build --workspace @atem-overseer/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @av/restreamer && npm run typecheck --workspace @atem-overseer/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @atem-overseer/web
